items.name: iampedii/WhiteDNS-Wizard
items.full_text: Cloudflare-first WhiteDNS CLI/TUI for provisioning a managed 3x-ui/Xray VPN stack over SSH, with DNS, certificates, client import links, Tor-routed profiles, diagnostics, backups, and repair/reset flows.
